g.onclick: sendPrompt('What responsibilities does a publisher have in Pub/Sub?')
sendPrompt('Can multiple services publish to the same topic in Pub/Sub?')

sendPrompt('How does topic partitioning help with scale?')
sendPrompt('How does a notification service subscribe to Pub/Sub events?')
sendPrompt('How does inventory management consume order events?')
sendPrompt('How does an analytics pipeline consume Pub/Sub events?')
sendPrompt('When should I use at-most-once delivery in Pub/Sub?')
sendPrompt('How do I make subscribers idempotent for at-least-once delivery?')
sendPrompt('How is exactly-once delivery achieved in distributed systems?')
sendPrompt('How do I handle duplicate message delivery in Pub/Sub?')
sendPrompt('What is a poison message and how do dead letter queues work?')
sendPrompt('How do I monitor and handle consumer lag in Kafka or Pub/Sub?')
sendPrompt('How do I handle schema evolution in an event-driven system?')
sendPrompt('What is a hot topic in Pub/Sub and how do I resolve it?')
sendPrompt('How do I design a highly available message broker?')
sendPrompt('When should I use Apache Kafka over managed Pub/Sub services?')
sendPrompt('How does Google Cloud Pub/Sub compare to Kafka?')
